overrides.hero_title: Free school meals: Lambeth's expanded offer
overrides.hero_subtitle: Important news for parents and carers
overrides.intro_html: From September 2026, every Lambeth child whose family receives Universal Credit can get free school meals.
overrides.cta_primary_body_html: Lambeth has been auto-enrolling children for years. Most eligible children will be signed up automatically — but contact your school if you don't hear from us by September.
overrides.box1_title: If your child currently gets free school meals
overrides.box1_body_html: Lambeth checks eligibility every year and auto-enrols most eligible children. If your circumstances have changed, contact your school or the Lambeth Welfare team to make sure your child stays signed up.
overrides.box2_title: If you receive Universal Credit but haven't claimed before
overrides.box2_body_html: Your child is now eligible. Lambeth may auto-enrol you from 1 June — or apply directly through your school for the start of September. Full details: lambeth.gov.uk/freeschoolmeals.
overrides.how_to_steps_html:
• Apply at lambeth.gov.uk/freeschoolmeals
  • Or via your school's website
  • Or pick up a paper copy from the school office
overrides.cta_secondary_body_html: You may still be entitled. Use Lambeth's free benefit calculator to check if you could qualify for Universal Credit and free school meals.
